creator: sbruno@FreeBSD.org
text:
Under normal use, I get 1-2 core dumps a day.  This is a recent change in behavior (last 2 to 3 months.$ gdb /usr/local/bin/evolution evolution.core

Type "show copying" to see the conditions.
There is absolutely no warranty for GDB.  Type "show warranty" for details.
